headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Edge Lower As Inflation Jitters Linger
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Mar, 11 2026 E mini S&P 500 futures are slightly lower this morning as investors weigh a mix of housing, jobs and bond market signals. Existing home sales sit at an annual pace of 4.09 million, with the typical home priced at US$398,000, which matters for anyone thinking about moving or tapping home equity. Private sector job gains of about 15,500 a week show the job market is still adding positions, supporting paychecks and spending...
